hints.description: This company operates a global online vehicle auction platform and related services, primarily dealing with salvage, repairable, and clean title vehicles. They facilitate the sale of vehicles to licensed dealers, dismantlers, and exporters, providing a marketplace for both sellers (insurance companies, rental car companies, etc.) and buyers. Founded by ***** ******, the company has grown significantly due to the increasing volume of vehicles needing disposal and the efficiency of its online auction model.
hints.funFact1: The company's initial auction platform was built using Lotus 1-2-3 and Microsoft Access in the early 1990s, demonstrating a humble beginning before transitioning to more sophisticated technology.
hints.funFact2: ***** *****, the founder, initially started the business selling vehicles from his own salvage yard in California before developing the online auction concept to expand reach and efficiency.
